name: Beef or Chicken Filet with Tomatillo Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil over high heat in a skillet.
2. Sauté beef or chicken until just done.
3. Soften the tortillas in the hot oil and place them on 4 plates.
4. Put the beef or chicken on top of each tortilla, followed by a cheese slice.
5. Broil briefly to melt the cheese.
6. Surround the meat with about three-quarters cups of sauce, covering the tortilla.
7. Sprinkle with cilantro.
